meta.title: NEW Higgsfield Popcorn Beats Nano Banana AI Image Generator?
meta.description:
Higgsfield Popcorn is here! Is this better than Nano banana AI image editor?
Try Higgsfield popcorn 👉 https://higgsfield.ai?fpr=dankieft

Higgsfield just launched Higgsfield Popcorn! This directly competes with Nano banana and seedream 4.0. In this video we're testing out this new AI image editor to see if it is any good. With the storyboarding feature you can make up to 8 different images just from 1 reference video. 

#HiggsfieldPopcorn #HiggsfieldSoul #Higgsfield #VideoGeneration #AIVideo

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
My toolkit gives you over 30+ ai tools that I've gathered over the years and use daily. You'll also get access to my free newsletter that educates you about the latest ai tools.

📧 For business inquiries: business@dankieft.com
Follow me on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dan.kieft/
